SWING DOORS REQUIRED. WE NEED FULL TRUCK. CANT BE MIXED WITH OTHER PRODUCT. **The rate confirmation is not a BOL. The content is confidential and should not be printed or shown to other parties** Pick up and delivery are by appointment only, detentions are not allowed and lay overs will be request to the clients and pre approved. Make sure you make it on time receiver and shipper will charge reefer must be set in continuous at all times, absolutely not start stop operations claims or heavy fines may arise. Check calls every dat 9 am and 5 pm est, also during loading and unloading count the product and make sure it matches the bol before leaving, any missed product will be driver responsibility. DO NOT LEAVE TRAILER UNATENDED AT ANY MOMENT ANY ISSUES CALL ANDRES 786-681-5132 and LAURA 786-922-0582 Pick Up# American Freight Movers CONTACT INFORMATION ANDRES PIZARRO 786-6815132 # Action Date/Time 1 Pickup 12/16/25 06:00 2 Location Contact NLaws Refrigerated Port Services 701 US-80 W., Bldg 48-49 Savannah, GA 31408 USA Primary Contact Phone: +1 912-428-5209 Driver Instructions: Driver Instructions: Must check in before 07:00AM **Driver must send a picture of the BOL before leave the facility or will be $200 fee Any delay will be $200 Delivery 12/17/25 09:00 EVERSANA 5650 Challenge Dr Memphis, TN 38115-5016 USA Primary Contact Phone: Driver Instructions: DRIVER MUST SEND PICTURE OF POD BEFORE LEAVING FOR APPROVAL, OTHERWISE WILL BE A $200 FEE Any delay will be $500 or possible claim if the driver arrives early, please instruct him to not park on the road as sometimes people attempt theft due to there being a lot of warehouses near by The receiver has a secured parking yard, the driver can use that yard for parking securely, he just needs to show a copy of the delivery order that we will give him when he picks up from us.
